meta.homeTitle: Freshman AI - Active Recall Study App | Transform Notes into Practice Tests
meta.homeDescription: Students waste hours highlighting and rereading, but research shows active recall is 50% more effective. Freshman uses AI to convert your handwritten notes, PDFs, and photos into scientifically-designed active recall questions with spaced repetition for permanent memory retention.
meta.termsDescription: Terms of Use for Freshman, a study app by People Who Code LLC
meta.privacyDescription: Privacy Policy for Freshman, a study app by People Who Code LLC

hero.title: Remember everything you study.
hero.subtitle: Built on proven cognitive science, Freshman converts your notes into perfect Active Recall tests, guaranteeing permanent, exam-proof memory and 50% better retention.

items.title: Daily Revision
items.text: Freshman generates targeted notes and quick tests for any topic, empowering you to build a daily revision habit that sticks.

items.title: Past Paper Practice
items.text: Upload your old exams and practice them interactively. Turn static past papers into dynamic, auto-graded MCQ tests.

items.title: Comprehensive Testing
items.text: Easily generate quizzes, flashcards, and full mock exams to deeply understand your subjects and instantly identify knowledge gaps.

items.title: Note Breakdown
items.text: Watch your uploaded notes automatically transform into core concepts and targeted revision questions, saving hours of manual synthesis.

dailyFeed.title: reveision as simple as swiping
dailyFeed.description: Open Freshman to get a daily stream of bite-sized revision prompts, quick challenges, and concept refreshers tailored to your progress. Keep your streak alive and stay exam-ready with just a few minutes each day.

items.title: Break Down Dense Textbooks
items.description: Upload your textbooks and Freshman will break them down into digestible chapters. Get high-level notes and deep-dive breakdowns for every section so you can skip the fluff and focus on what’s actually on the exam.

items.title: Don’t Just Memorize. Master.
items.description: Move beyond basic memorization. Active recall tests force you to articulate complex concepts in your own words. It’s the fastest way to find and fix your knowledge gaps.

pastPapers.title: practice with real exam questions
pastPapers.description: Upload past papers and instantly transform them into interactive MCQ tests. Practice with real exam questions, receive immediate feedback on each answer, and read detailed explanations to understand every concept. Build confidence by mastering actual exam patterns before test day.

bullets.title: Interactive MCQ Tests
bullets.text: Auto-generated questions from your past papers

bullets.title: Immediate Feedback
bullets.text: Know instantly if your answer is correct or wrong

bullets.title: Detailed Explanations
bullets.text: Understand the reasoning behind every answer

pricing.title: Flexible Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Everything you need to build powerful study habits.

androidWaitlist.title: Android is coming soon
androidWaitlist.description: We are putting the finishing touches on our Android app. Join the waitlist to get notified the moment it goes live later this month.

items.question: What kind of notes can I upload?
items.answer: You can upload almost anything! Freshman can read handwritten notes (from photos), PDF textbooks, PowerPoint slides, and standard digital text files. As long as the text is legible, we can turn it into a test.

items.question: How accurate are the generated questions?
items.answer: Freshman is highly accurate at identifying key concepts and creating relevant questions, though we always recommend reviewing the generated content as you study.

items.question: Can I use this for any subject?
items.answer: Absolutely. Whether you are studying Biology, Law, History, Computer Science, or Literature, Freshman adapts to the content you provide. It works for any education level, from High School to PhD.

items.question: When will Freshman be available on Android?
items.answer: Freshman is currently available on iOS. We're actively developing the Android version and expect to launch it soon. Join our waitlist to be notified when the Android app becomes available.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime. There is no long-term commitment, and You can cancel your subscription instantly through your Apple ID settings at any time.
